title: Modernize embedded-specific tests
description: Restructure vesc-pkg-build native-lib tests: split build/inspect/assert, reduce toolchain grepping, tier slow audits. Phases: 1 restructure, 2 object crate, 3 disasm golden, 4 cargo vescpkg pipeline, 5 QEMU/HIL deferred.

title: Phase 1: Extract native_build.rs from symbol_audit
description: Move build_rust_staticlib/build_elf/bin orchestration and RepoNativeBuildCache into native_build.rs; re-export from symbol_audit or lib.
close_reason: Completed: extracted native_build.rs with RepoNativeBuildCache and build orchestration; symbol_audit re-exports; make check passes

title: Phase 1: Extract native_inspect.rs from symbol_audit
description: Move nm_output, section layout parsing, command_stdout helpers into native_inspect.rs.
close_reason: Completed: native_inspect.rs with nm_output, section layout parsing, command_stdout; symbol_audit re-exports

title: Phase 1: Extract native_audit helpers module
description: Move symbol allowlists and assert_rust_loader_init_uses_vesc_ffi into native_audit.rs.
close_reason: Completed: native_audit.rs extracted; device-proven fixture at fixtures/device-proven/legacy-init.bin

title: Phase 1: Split native_lib_audit into focused tests
description: Split monolithic test into symbols, section layout, blob budget, and disassembly tier tests.
close_reason: Completed: split into symbols/layout/disassembly tests; deduped init disassembly checks

title: Phase 1: Consolidate native_lib_baseline tests
description: Merge 10 baseline tests into 2: fixture layout + vesc_c_if ABI pins.
close_reason: Merged 10 baseline tests into baseline_fixture_layout + vesc_c_if_abi_pins

title: Phase 1: Relocate device-proven fixture
description: Move THIS_FUCKING_RAN_AT_LEAST.bin.good to fixtures/device-proven/ with README.
close_reason: Completed: native_audit.rs extracted; device-proven fixture at fixtures/device-proven/legacy-init.bin

title: Phase 1: Add nextest profiles for embedded tier
description: Add .config/nextest.toml default vs embedded profiles; wire Makefile symbol-check.

title: Phase 2: Parse ELF with object crate
description: Replace nm/objdump -h/readelf subprocesses with object crate parsers in native_inspect.

title: Phase 2: Remove legacy tool-audit path
description: Delete subprocess helpers after object parser validated.

title: Phase 3: Disassembly golden snapshots
description: Use insta for init/probe/stop disassembly; run only in embedded/symbol-check profile.

title: Phase 3: Deduplicate init disassembly assertions
description: Remove redundant init checks from native_lib_audit.
close_reason: Completed: split into symbols/layout/disassembly tests; deduped init disassembly checks

title: Phase 4: Route native build through cargo vescpkg
description: Tests use PackageRunner/cargo vescpkg build instead of duplicated gcc invocations.

title: Phase 5: Document QEMU/HIL deferral
description: Add roadmap note for future hardware-in-loop; no implementation yet.

title: Harden embedded test pyramid
description: Follow-up after vesc-wke: doc drift, CI tiers, insta stability, native build unification, disassembly without objdump.

title: Harden embedded test pyramid
description: Follow-up after vesc-wke: doc drift, CI tiers, insta stability, native build unification, disassembly without objdump.

title: Fix test-tier documentation drift
description: Update package-flow.md and roadmap test for default vs symbol-check tiers.

title: Add check-full Make target
description: Add make check-full running default + embedded profiles; document in Makefile and hygiene.

title: Stabilize disassembly golden snapshots
description: Redact absolute addresses in insta disassembly snapshots so layout tweaks do not flake.

title: Unify native build with cargo vescpkg
description: Route native_build artifact production through PackageTargetPlan/cargo vescpkg instead of parallel gcc paths.

title: Drop objdump disassembly subprocess
description: Replace arm-none-eabi-objdump -d in embedded disassembly audit with in-process decoder.

title: Wire embedded tier into CI
description: Ensure release/CI path runs symbol-check or check-full; wire flake check if applicable.

title: Modernize host-side and package-pipeline tests
description:
## Background

Follow-up to completed epics **vesc-wke** (embedded native-lib modernization) and **vesc-5p6**
(test pyramid hygiene, build unification, semantic ELF audits, single integration test).

**Current state (post e25bb14):**
- Fast tier (`nextest` default profile): ~140 tests in ~2.4s — no gcc, no shared `target/` races
- Embedded tier (`profile.embedded`): **one** integration test — `crates/vesc-pkg-build/tests/native_lib_artifacts.rs` (~0.9s)
- Insta snapshots: semantic ELF report only (`tests/snapshots/native_lib_artifacts__native_lib_semantics.snap`)
- Integration tests on disk: `native_lib_artifacts.rs`, `vesc-host-cli/tests/fake_ble_integration.rs`
- `insta` is a dev-dependency on `vesc-pkg-build` only — **no separate snapshot crate**

**Remaining debt this epic addresses:**
- Three duplicate `FakeRunner` structs (`cargo_vescpkg_command`, `package_build`, `package_conversion`)
- Duplicated VESC Packet / Lisp-import binary parsing (`package_format` test helpers vs `vesc-host-cli::package_install` vs `package_transport`)
- ~17 heavy unit tests across `package_format` (5), `package_build` (6), `package_target` (3), `package_artifacts` (3) each spinning up `TempWorkspace` independently
- `baseline_fixture_layout` + `vesc_c_if_abi_pins` still unit tests; `make package-smoke` runs one of them in isolation
- `lifecycle_tests.rs`: 19 repetitive one-assert tests with duplicated `FakeBindings` setup
- Brittle string-oracle doc tests: `hygiene::repo_workspace_hygiene` greps Makefile literals; `rust_package_api_roadmap` and `cargo_vescpkg_command` grep markdown needles
- Coverage gates only `vesc-ffi` and `vesc-package` — not `vesc-pkg-build` or `vesc-host-cli`
- No `cargo-hack` feature-matrix check for `test-support` vs embedded default features
- No `trybuild` compile-fail guards on `vesc-ffi` unsafe contracts
- HIL/QEMU lane documented as deferred but not designed as a nextest profile

## Goals

Apply the **same idiomatic pattern as `native_lib_artifacts`** across the rest of the test pyramid:
- **Pure library audit/build helpers** with no hidden side effects
- **One integration test per expensive pipeline** (build once, assert many, insta where helpful)
- **Fast parallel unit tier** for pure logic, error mapping, and small helpers
- **Explicit nextest profiles** instead of ad hoc Make one-offs

## Target test pyramid

```text
Fast (default):     unit tests only — no gcc, no shared artifact dirs
Package (new):      fixture + wire-format integration — no gcc
Embedded (existing): tests/native_lib_artifacts.rs — gcc once per run
HIL (future):       device loopback — env-gated, excluded from check-full
```

## Non-goals

- A separate snapshot crate (`insta` stays a dev-dep on the crate that owns the test)
- `--test-threads 1` or serializing the fast tier
- Invoking gcc/arm-none-eabi from unit tests (toolchain work stays in embedded integration tests)
- Implementing QEMU/HIL hardware runners in this epic (design + docs only in Phase 11)
- Rewriting production code beyond what test deduplication requires

## Architecture principles (carry forward from vesc-5p6)

1. Build side effects live in integration tests, not library unit tests
2. Snapshots use stable redaction (addresses, payload hashes) not raw binary dumps
3. Shared fakes live in `test_support`, not copy-pasted per module
4. Doc/hygiene tests assert structure or executable contracts, not fragile substring lists
5. `make check-full` = fmt + clippy + fast tier + embedded tier (+ package tier when wired)

## Acceptance criteria (epic closure)

- [ ] `make check-full` green with new package tier wired
- [ ] No duplicate `FakeRunner` or VESC Packet parsers in test modules
- [ ] `package_format` blob-oracle tests demoted; `tests/package_pipeline.rs` owns end-to-end wire asserts
- [ ] `tests/fixtures.rs` owns baseline + ABI + device-proven fixture checks
- [ ] `lifecycle_tests.rs` table-driven via `rstest` (or equivalent)
- [ ] Hygiene test no longer greps Makefile substring literals
- [ ] Coverage targets exist for `vesc-pkg-build` and `vesc-host-cli`
- [ ] HIL tier documented with env gates; not in default CI path
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 1: Extract shared FakeConversionRunner in test_support
description:
Move the duplicated `FakeRunner` + `PackageBinaryConversionRunner` impl from:
- `crates/vesc-pkg-build/src/cargo_vescpkg_command.rs` (tests mod)
- `crates/vesc-pkg-build/src/package_build.rs` (tests mod)
- `crates/vesc-pkg-build/src/package_conversion.rs` (tests mod)

Into `crates/vesc-pkg-build/src/test_support.rs` (or `test_support/fake_conversion.rs`).

**Acceptance:** all three modules import the shared fake; behavior unchanged; `make check` green.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 1: Extract package_wire module for VESC Packet parsing
description:
Create a production or `#[cfg(test)]`-visible module (e.g. `package_wire` or extend `package_format`)
that owns:
- qCompress decompress
- `"VESC Packet"` field spine walk
- Lisp import table parse (tag, offset, size, payload slice)

**Sources to dedupe:**
- `package_format.rs` test helpers (`decompress_package`, `parse_lisp_imports`, `package_fields`)
- `vesc-host-cli/src/package_install.rs` load/parse path
- `vesc-host-cli/src/package_transport.rs` field reads where duplicated

**Acceptance:** single parser tested once; host + build crates call shared API.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 1: Add PackageTestHarness for TempWorkspace fixture trees
description:
Encapsulate repeated TempWorkspace setup used by:
- `package_format` tests (5)
- `package_build` tests (6)
- `package_target` tests (3)
- `package_artifacts` tests (3)
- `cargo_vescpkg_command` tests

Harness should write minimal pkgdesc/assets, optional fake native bin stub, and expose paths.

**Acceptance:** at least two test modules migrated to harness; no behavior change.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 2: Add tests/package_pipeline.rs integration test
description:
New integration test mirroring `native_lib_artifacts.rs` pattern:
1. Build minimal fixture via `PackageTestHarness` + `FakeConversionRunner`
2. Run staging → conversion (fake) → `.vescpkg` emission → inspection
3. Assert via `package_wire` + `audit_*`-style pure helpers

**Must not** invoke gcc or touch `target/thumbv7em-*`.

**Acceptance:** one test function; runs in new `package` nextest profile; `make check` still skips it by default.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 2: Insta snapshot for vescpkg wire format in package_pipeline
description:
Add `wire_snapshot_report(&vescpkg_bytes) -> String` with redaction:
- Field keys in order
- Payload lengths
- SHA256 of binary payloads (not raw bytes)
- Lisp import table: tag, offset, size

`insta::assert_snapshot!("package_pipeline_wire", report)` in `tests/package_pipeline.rs`.

**Acceptance:** snapshot under `tests/snapshots/`; stable across runs; reviewable diffs on intentional format changes.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 2: Demote package_format blob-oracle unit tests
description:
After `package_pipeline` lands, reduce `package_format.rs` tests to:
- Pure helpers (string parsing, sanitize, small unit logic)
- Remove redundant full-package blob walks now covered by integration test + insta

Keep tests that cover error paths not exercised by the happy-path integration test.

**Acceptance:** fewer than 3 full-package unit tests remain; coverage preserved via integration test.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 2: Demote package_build and package_target integration-style unit tests
description:
Move end-to-end plan/run assertions that belong in `package_pipeline` out of:
- `package_build.rs` tests mod
- `package_target.rs` tests mod
- `package_artifacts.rs` tests mod (where overlapping)

Retain unit tests for: plan path rendering, error mapping, fake runner call recording.

**Acceptance:** no TempWorkspace full pipeline test duplicates `package_pipeline`; fast tier time unchanged or faster.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 3: Add tests/fixtures.rs integration test
description:
Consolidate fixture audits currently split across:
- `native_lib_baseline::tests::baseline_fixture_layout`
- `native_lib_baseline::tests::vesc_c_if_abi_pins`
- `fixtures/device-proven/legacy-init.hex` (referenced in hygiene / native_audit)

Single integration test file: `crates/vesc-pkg-build/tests/fixtures.rs`.

**Acceptance:** both baseline tests removed from unit mod or reduced to thin re-exports; fixtures test passes.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 3: Wire package-smoke and fixtures tier into Makefile and nextest
description:
Replace or augment `make package-smoke` (currently `baseline_fixture_layout` only) to run the
`fixtures` integration test via `nextest --profile package`.

Update `docs/package-flow.md` with the package tier command.

**Acceptance:** `make test-package` (or updated `package-smoke`) runs fixtures + package_pipeline; documented.
close_reason: Epic complete: test pyramid modernized, check-full green

title: Phase 4: Add rstest and table-drive lifecycle registration tests
description:
Add `rstest` dev-dependency to `vesc-package`.

Convert registration outcome tests in `lifecycle_tests.rs` to tables:
- invalid extension name → `RegisterError::InvalidExtensionName`
- firmware reject → `RegisterError::FirmwareRejected`
- success paths with handler rebase (`register_extension_from_image`)

**Acceptance:** ≥3 table cases; removed standalone one-assert tests for same behavior.

title: Phase 4: Table-drive LbmApi and LoopbackLifecycle forwarding tests
description:
Convert repetitive tests in `lifecycle_tests.rs` for:
- `LbmApi`: encode_i32, decode_i32, is_number, encode_eval_error
- `LoopbackLifecycle`: system_time_ticks, send_app_data length/pointer recording
- `FakeAppDataBindings` / `FakeBindings` call counts

**Acceptance:** one `#[rstest]` module per concern; net reduction in test LOC; all cases preserved.

title: Phase 5: Add nextest package profile and update default filter
description:
Extend `.config/nextest.toml`:

```toml
[profile.package]
default-filter = 'test(package_pipeline) or test(fixtures)'

[profile.default]
default-filter = 'not test(native_lib_artifacts) and not test(package_pipeline) and not test(fixtures)'
```

Add `make test-package` running `--profile package`.

**Acceptance:** default tier excludes package integration tests; package profile runs exactly 2 tests.

title: Phase 5: Extend check-full to include package tier (optional gate)
description:
Update `Makefile`:
- `check-full: check symbol-check test-package` (or fold into symbol-check successor)

Update `flake.nix` `checks.check-full` if present.

Update `hygiene.rs` once Phase 6 lands.

**Acceptance:** `nix develop -c make check-full` runs fast + embedded + package tiers.

title: Phase 6: Replace Makefile substring hygiene checks
description:
`hygiene::repo_workspace_hygiene` currently asserts Makefile contains literal strings like
`"test-changed -r nextest"`. Replace with:
- `make -n check` / `make -n check-full` exit 0 from repo root, OR
- shared `build_manifest.toml` listing required targets read by both Makefile generator and test

Keep git-ignore and lockfile tracking asserts (those are good).

**Acceptance:** hygiene test survives Makefile rewording; still catches missing targets.

title: Phase 6: Modernize roadmap and cargo-vescpkg doc oracle tests
description:
Refactor:
- `rust_package_api_roadmap.rs` 20-needle loop
- `cargo_vescpkg_command.rs` design doc needle checks

Options (pick one per file):
- Required markdown section headers (`## Fast tier`, `## Embedded tier`, etc.)
- Insta snapshot of the migration ladder section only
- Front-matter checklist parsed from the doc itself

**Acceptance:** doc rewording within sections does not break tests; missing sections still fail.

title: Phase 7: Add coverage-pkg-build Make target
description:
Mirror existing `coverage-ffi` / `coverage-package` pattern:
- `make coverage-pkg-build` using `cargo llvm-cov -p vesc-pkg-build`
- `--ignore-filename-regex` for test modules and integration tests
- `COVERAGE_FAIL_UNDER` consistent with existing gates (default 80)

**Acceptance:** target runs in nix develop; documents in Makefile help comment.

title: Phase 7: Add coverage-host-cli Make target
description:
Add `make coverage-host-cli` for `vesc-host-cli` focusing on:
- `package_install.rs`
- `package_transport.rs`
- `loopback.rs` (fake transport paths)

**Acceptance:** runs green; optional inclusion in `make coverage` aggregate.

title: Phase 8: Add cargo-hack feature matrix checks
description:
Add `cargo-hack` to flake devshell if not present.

CI/local script:
- `cargo hack check --each-feature -p vesc-package`
- `cargo hack check --each-feature -p vesc-rust-poc`
- `cargo clippy -p vesc-ble-loopback --release --target thumbv7em-none-eabihf` (already in Makefile)

Document matrix in `docs/rust-package-api-roadmap.md`.

**Acceptance:** embedded target builds without `test-support`; host crates build with all feature combos.

title: Phase 9: Add trybuild compile-fail tests to vesc-ffi
description:
Add `trybuild` dev-dependency to `vesc-ffi`.

Initial compile-fail cases:
- Using raw firmware slot accessors without required init context (if enforceable)
- Document intended unsafe contracts via failing examples in `tests/ui/`

**Acceptance:** `cargo test -p vesc-ffi` runs trybuild pass + fail suite; at least 2 compile-fail cases.

title: Phase 10: Design HIL nextest profile and document deferral
description:
Design (no hardware runner required in this task):
- `nextest` profile `hil` filtering `test(hil_)` tests
- Env gates: `VESC_DEVICE`, `VESC_BLE_ADDR`
- `#[ignore]` integration test sketch: `tests/hil_loopback.rs`
- Explicit exclusion from `make check-full`

Update `docs/rust-package-api-roadmap.md` § Deferred QEMU/HIL and `docs/package-flow.md`.

**Acceptance:** documented workflow; empty/stub test marked ignore; profile defined in nextest.toml.

title: Phase 11: Document fake_ble_integration host-bridge test pattern
description:
`vesc-host-cli/tests/fake_ble_integration.rs` bridges `FakeFirmwareServices` ↔ host `LoopbackTransport`.
Document as the canonical host↔firmware-in-process pattern in `docs/package-flow.md` or test README.

Evaluate whether `package_install` needs a similar bridge test once `package_wire` exists.

**Acceptance:** doc section exists; linked from roadmap; no new test required unless gap found.

title: Phase 12: Update package-flow.md with full test pyramid
description:
Document all tiers with commands and expected timing:
- `make check` / default profile (~140 tests, ~2s)
- `make test-package` / package profile (fixtures + pipeline)
- `make symbol-check` / embedded profile (native_lib_artifacts)
- future `make test-hil` / hil profile

Include `INSTA_UPDATE=always` workflow and `VESC_PKG_DISASM=1` debug flag.

**Acceptance:** doc matches `.config/nextest.toml` and Makefile; hygiene test updated if needed.

title: Phase 12: Final green check-full and epic closure
description:
Verification gate before closing epic:
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --all --check`
- `nix develop -c make check-full`
- Confirm tier counts: default, package, embedded
- Close all child tasks with specific proof (commit SHAs, test counts)

**Acceptance:** all sibling tasks closed; epic closed with summary of commits.

title: Advance test quality, CI gates, and HIL readiness
description:
## Background

Follow-up to completed epic **vesc-jb7** (host-side and package-pipeline test modernization).

**Current state (post jb7):**
- Fast tier: ~139 host tests in ~2.5s (`make check`, nextest default profile)
- Package tier: `fixtures` + `package_pipeline` integration tests (`make test-package`)
- Embedded tier: `native_lib_artifacts` semantic ELF audit (`make symbol-check`)
- Feature matrix: `cargo-hack --each-feature` for host crates + thumb release lib (`make hack-check`)
- Full gate: `make check-full` = check + symbol-check + test-package
- Compile-fail: trybuild UI tests in `vesc-ffi` (no_std + unsafe raw FFI)
- Coverage Make targets exist for all major crates but are **not CI-gated**
- HIL sketch is a stub (`hil_loopback.rs` only checks env vars)
- Nix `checks.check` / `checks.check-full` exist; **no** `checks.hack-check` or coverage check
- **No GitHub Actions** workflow yet
- `vesc-protocol` wire codec tested with hand-picked cases only — no property/fuzz coverage
- `fake_ble_integration` covers loopback only; package-install path has no in-process bridge test

**Remaining debt this epic addresses:**
- CI does not run the full local pyramid (`hack-check`, coverage, package tier split)
- Property-based tests missing for protocol framing edge cases (length, version, command bounds)
- Payload crates beyond `vesc-ffi` lack compile-fail guards against `std`/`alloc` leakage
- HIL lane designed but not implemented beyond env-var presence check
- Coverage thresholds documented but not enforced in Nix checks or PR workflow
- `cargo-test-changed` in devshell but no Makefile/doc workflow for partial test runs

## Goals

Raise test **quality and enforcement** without bloating the fast tier:
- **Property tests** for wire invariants (`vesc-protocol`)
- **Broader compile-fail** coverage for payload `no_std` contracts
- **CI/Nix parity** with local Make targets (`check`, `check-full`, `hack-check`)
- **Real HIL smoke** behind env gates (ping/echo or lisp-probe), still excluded from `check-full`
- **In-process host bridge** tests for package-install transport boundaries
- **Optional coverage gate** in Nix (not default `make check`)

## Target test pyramid (v2)

```text
Fast (default):     unit + compile-fail + property tests — no gcc
Package:            fixtures + wire pipeline — no gcc
Embedded:           native_lib_artifacts — gcc once
Feature matrix:     cargo-hack — host + thumb lib
Coverage (opt):     llvm-cov per crate — CI or manual
HIL (manual):       real device loopback — env-gated, nextest hil profile
CI:                 Nix checks + GitHub Actions matrix mirroring tiers
```

## Non-goals

- QEMU system emulation (document only if explored)
- Replacing generic VESC linker/scripts (`vesc_c_if.h`, `link.ld`) — separate migration epic
- `--test-threads 1` or serializing the fast tier
- A separate snapshot crate
- `vesc-payload-guard` or wrapper crates for no_std enforcement

## Architecture principles (carry forward)

1. Build side effects stay in integration tests, not library unit tests
2. Property tests assert invariants; unit tests keep readable examples
3. Compile-fail tests lock ABI/`no_std` contracts without runtime cost
4. HIL stays opt-in; default CI path stays deterministic and hardware-free
5. Snapshots use stable redaction, not raw binary dumps

## Acceptance criteria (epic closure)

- [ ] Nix `checks` include at least `hack-check`; GitHub Actions runs `check` + `check-full` (or Nix equivalents)
- [ ] `vesc-protocol` has proptest (or equivalent) roundtrip/rejection coverage for loopback frames
- [ ] trybuild compile-fail tests cover payload crates (`vesc-package`, `vesc-ble-loopback`) for std/alloc misuse
- [ ] HIL test performs a real loopback or lisp-probe exchange when env vars set (still `#[ignore]` in default profile)
- [ ] Package-install has at least one in-process integration test via fake transport pattern
- [ ] Coverage gate documented and wired into optional Nix check or CI job
- [ ] Docs (`package-flow.md`, `rust-package-api-roadmap.md`) reflect v2 pyramid and CI commands

title: Phase 1: Add Nix checks.hack-check mirroring make hack-check
description:
Add `checks.hack-check` to `flake.nix` running `make hack-check` with `cargo-hack` in nativeBuildInputs.

Wire `cargo-hack` into the existing check env the same way as the devshell.

**Acceptance:** `nix build .#checks.hack-check` succeeds on aarch64-darwin.

title: Phase 1: Add GitHub Actions workflow for check and check-full
description:
Add `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (or split fast/full jobs) that:
- Uses Nix flake `checks.check` for PR fast path
- Runs `checks.check-full` on main or nightly schedule (or both with path filters)

Document required secrets (none for hardware-free path).

**Acceptance:** workflow file matches local Make/Nix tier names; no HIL in default jobs.

title: Phase 2: Add proptest roundtrips for vesc-protocol loopback codec
description:
Add `proptest` (or `proptest-derive`) as dev-dep on `vesc-protocol`.

Property tests for:
- Ping/echo/status roundtrip for valid payloads within BLE budget
- Rejection of oversize payloads, unknown versions, unknown commands
- Command code roundtrip invariant

Keep existing unit tests as readable examples; proptest owns edge-case volume.

**Acceptance:** new tests in fast tier; `make check` green.

title: Phase 2: Table-drive protocol rejection cases with rstest
description:
Refactor hand-rolled rejection tests in `ble_loopback.rs` to rstest table cases where it reduces duplication without losing clarity.

**Acceptance:** no behavior change; fewer one-off assert blocks.

title: Phase 3: trybuild compile-fail tests for vesc-package no_std
description:
Add `tests/ui/` compile-fail cases under `vesc-package`:
- `#![no_std]` harness importing `alloc` or `std`
- Optional: calling unsafe lifecycle APIs without unsafe block

Mirror `vesc-ffi` trybuild harness pattern.

**Acceptance:** `compile_fail_ui` integration test; stderr snapshots committed.

title: Phase 3: trybuild compile-fail tests for vesc-ble-loopback payload
description:
Same compile-fail pattern for `vesc-ble-loopback` (std/alloc misuse under device build).

Use thumb host check or trybuild harness as appropriate for crate layout.

**Acceptance:** compile-fail tests run in `make check`.

title: Phase 4: Add optional Nix checks.coverage aggregate
description:
Add `checks.coverage` (or `checks.coverage-smoke`) running `make coverage` with llvm-tools in flake check env.

Keep **out** of default `check-full` to avoid slowing local dev; document as CI optional job.

**Acceptance:** Nix check runs coverage targets; fails if below COVERAGE_FAIL_UNDER.

title: Phase 4: Document coverage workflow in package-flow and roadmap
description:
Add coverage tier row to test pyramid docs; note per-crate ignore regexes and when to run locally vs CI.

**Acceptance:** docs match Makefile `coverage-*` targets.

title: Phase 5: In-process package-install integration test
description:
Add `vesc-host-cli/tests/fake_package_install.rs` (or extend test_support):
- Fake transport recording VESC Tool ordered writes/erases
- Run `install_package` / `erase_package` against decoded fixture `.vescpkg`
- Assert step order and packet shapes without BLE hardware

Follow `fake_ble_integration.rs` as the canonical bridge pattern.

**Acceptance:** one integration test in fast tier; uses existing fixtures.

title: Phase 5: Extract shared FakePackageTransport in test_support
description:
If fake package-install test duplicates transport recording logic from unit tests, consolidate into `vesc-host-cli` test module or shared test helper.

**Acceptance:** no duplicate fake transport structs across install/transport test modules.

title: Phase 6: Implement real HIL loopback smoke test
description:
Replace env-var-only stub in `hil_loopback.rs` with:
- Connect via `VESC_BLE_ADDR` / `VESC_DEVICE`
- Run ping + echo through existing `LoopbackTransport` / btle stack
- Clear skip message when env missing

Keep `#[ignore]` and nextest `hil` profile filter.

**Acceptance:** manual run succeeds on bench hardware; default `make check` still skips.

title: Phase 6: Add HIL lisp-probe smoke (optional second test)
description:
Optional second ignored test calling lisp-probe path when extension is installed.

**Acceptance:** documented env requirements; excluded from check-full.

title: Phase 7: Add make test-changed and document PR workflow
description:
Ensure `make test-changed` works from repo root via nextest + cargo-test-changed.

Add short section to `docs/repo-hygiene.md` or package-flow for partial test runs on PR-sized diffs.

**Acceptance:** `make -n test-changed` passes hygiene; doc mentions devshell tool.

title: Phase 7: nextest per-profile timeouts and failure hooks
description:
Review `.config/nextest.toml` for:
- Reasonable timeouts on embedded/package profiles
- `[profile.*.failure]` or retry policy for flaky HIL (if any)

**Acceptance:** config documented in package-flow troubleshooting.

title: Phase 8: Redacted insta snapshot for package build plan
description:
Add stable insta snapshot for `PackageBuildPlan` or artifact inspection report (paths redacted/hashed) in package tier — only if it catches regressions unit tests miss.

**Acceptance:** snapshot in `tests/snapshots/`; updated via INSTA_UPDATE=always workflow.

title: Phase 9: Sync docs with v2 test pyramid and CI commands
description:
Update `docs/package-flow.md` and `docs/rust-package-api-roadmap.md` with:
- proptest / compile-fail / coverage / CI tiers
- GitHub Actions and Nix check names
- HIL run instructions post-implementation

Extend `hygiene.rs` dry-run asserts for new Make targets if added.

**Acceptance:** doc oracle tests still pass; hygiene covers new targets.

title: Phase 9: Final green check-full and epic closure
description:
Run `make check-full`, `make hack-check`, and Nix checks before closing epic.

Close **vesc-dfj** when acceptance criteria met.

**Acceptance:** all epic checkboxes satisfied; beads epic closed.

title: Comprehensive vesc-ffi testing
Wire device-side BLE loopback for end-to-end deploy
description:
## Background

The POC currently validates native loading and LispBM extension registration only. On hardware, `lisp-probe` succeeds:

```
lisp print: "vesc-rust-probe-rust-diag-v4"
lisp print: "vesc-rust-probe-ok-42"
```

`make deploy` then runs `vesc-cli loopback`, but the device does not handle loopback frames — loopback is not wired up on the package payload.

## Current gap

- `examples/loopback` `.init_fun` registers `ext-rust-probe-diag-v4` and installs the stop hook only (`init.rs`).
- `vesc_sdk::ble_loopback::register_loopback_app_data_handler()` exists but is explicitly opt-in and never called from device init.
- `loopback_app_data_handler` + `process_loopback_app_data` are unit-tested in `vesc-sdk`, but no firmware `DeviceServices` bridge drives BLE frames on device.
- Host `vesc-cli loopback` sends/receives over app-data; without a registered handler the POC stops at probe success.

## Goal

End-to-end loopback on real hardware after `make deploy`:

1. Package installs and loads native lib (already works).
2. Lisp probe still prints diag + ok-42 (regression guard).
3. `vesc-cli loopback` completes ping / status / echo against the installed package.

## Technical approach

1. **Device init** — call `register_loopback_app_data_handler()` (or equivalent lifecycle wiring) from `examples/loopback` init after extension registration; ensure stop hook clears handler.
2. **Firmware bridge** — implement or bind `DeviceServices` for real VESC BLE/app-data (init, connected, receive, send, ticks) or document minimal firmware slots required if a thinner app-data-only path suffices first.
3. **Package assets** — confirm `code.lisp` / loader only needs native load or add any Lisp-side loopback startup if required by firmware.
4. **Host path** — verify `vesc-cli loopback` target names (`vesc-loopback-test` / `vesc-loopback-service`) match pkgdesc/BLE advertising on device.
5. **Docs** — update roadmap/deploy notes: probe validates extensions; loopback validates app-data path.

## Success criteria

- `nix develop -c make deploy DEVICE_NAME=...` → loopback CLI exits success (not just lisp-probe).
- Existing unit tests in `vesc-sdk` / `vesc-protocol` remain green; add device-init integration test where feasible (test-support).
- Document manual HIL steps in `docs/rust-package-api-roadmap.md` or package README.

## Out of scope (follow-ups)

- Automating HIL in CI (`vesc-dfj.11`).
- Full `LoopbackPackageRuntime` tick loop on device if app-data handler alone is sufficient for host CLI loopback.

## Key files

- `examples/loopback/src/init.rs`
- `crates/vesc-sdk/src/ble_loopback.rs`
- `crates/vesc-cli/src/loopback.rs`
- `fixtures/native-lib-baseline/package/code.lisp`
